domain_experience: former compliance consultant for small financial firms
understands recurring compliance operations and documentation burdens
assets: practical knowledge of regulated small-firm workflows
ability to translate compliance pain into standardized services
network_access: a few warm contacts in small financial firms
constraints: must stay fully legal and avoid gray-area tactics
credibility_signals: prior paid work in a trust-sensitive regulated niche
unfair_advantages: domain fluency stronger than a generic AI operator
trusted buyer language and workflow understanding
warm access reduces early sales friction

opportunities.title: AI-assisted compliance operations retainer for small financial firms
opportunities.thesis: Offer a tightly scoped monthly service for recurring compliance operations, using AI to accelerate drafting, summarization, evidence organization, and status reporting while keeping human review in the loop.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user has real compliance workflow knowledge, trust-sensitive domain credibility, and warm contact access that a generic AI builder lacks.
validation_plan: Draft a one-page offer with scope and exclusions
Pitch a fixed-scope paid pilot or diagnostic
tool_specs: AI prompt library for summaries and remediation notes
kill_criteria: Target buyers view the work as legal advice rather than ops support

opportunities.title: Mock audit and remediation sprint
opportunities.thesis: Sell a fixed-fee compliance readiness review that produces a prioritized remediation plan and document-gap analysis.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user can diagnose real compliance readiness issues faster and more credibly than a generic consultant or AI generalist.
validation_plan: Ask warm contacts whether they would buy a one-time review
Use interviews to identify the most common remediation outputs
kill_criteria: Buyers want implementation help only, not diagnostics
Scope expands beyond a fixed-fee sprint

opportunities.title: Compliance evidence and task tracker for small firms
opportunities.thesis: Build a narrow evidence-tracking and recurring-task product designed around small-firm compliance operations.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user understands the recurring obligations and audit-trail requirements that off-the-shelf productivity tools ignore.
validation_plan: Manually deliver the workflow for 2 paying clients first
Track repeated tasks, fields, and reports before coding
Only build once repeated demand is visible
kill_criteria: No repeated workflow across initial service clients
Buyers prefer services over software with no urgency to switch

opportunities.title: Policy and procedure template library with update notes
opportunities.thesis: Sell a curated library of templates, checklists, and update notes tailored to small financial firms.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user has more domain credibility than generic template sellers and can make the material operationally useful.
validation_plan: Ask interviewees which artifacts they repeatedly need
Pre-sell a small starter pack before creating a large library
Keep disclaimers explicit and avoid legal-positioning claims
kill_criteria: Buyers want customization that turns the product into consulting

opportunities.title: Compliance operating system: retainer service to internal automation to lightweight client portal
opportunities.thesis: Start with a productized compliance operations retainer, convert repeated delivery into an internal automation stack, then expose the stable pieces through a lightweight client portal or micro-SaaS.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This path compounds the user's consulting background, niche trust, and workflow knowledge into a repeatable asset that generic AI operators cannot copy quickly.
validation_plan: Sell 1 paid pilot for a monthly ops-support offer
Document repeated tasks and outputs during delivery
Promote only repeated internal workflows into software
kill_criteria: Fewer than 3 of first 10 contacts confirm strong pain
No paid pilot or diagnostic sale within 14 days
Work requires unauthorized legal positioning or excessive liability
No repeated workflow appears across initial clients

opportunities.title: Exam-prep concierge to benchmark data to subscription dashboard
opportunities.thesis: Begin with paid exam-readiness support and aggregate anonymized issue patterns into a benchmark product later.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: The user understands buyer anxiety and can structure the work into repeatable issue categories and prep assets.
validation_plan: Capture recurring issue categories across engagements
Test whether benchmark insights change buying behavior
kill_criteria: Data is too sparse to produce meaningful benchmarks

next_actions: Draft a one-page Compliance Ops Support offer with explicit exclusions and review requirements
Contact 5 warm leads for 20-minute problem interviews
Turn the top pain point into a fixed-scope paid pilot
Build only the internal operator workflow first, not public SaaS
